meta.title: Plans and Pricing for Service Business Software

solo.title: Start with the setup that matches how you work today
solo.subtitle: Choose a solo plan that keeps quotes, invoicing, jobs, and growth tools aligned without adding unnecessary complexity.
solo.note: Start with a simple operating setup now, then move into broader coordination only when your business needs it.

team.eyebrow: Pricing for teams that need coordination
team.title: Choose the plan that fits your team, workflow, and growth stage
team.subtitle: From core operations to deeper automation and oversight, each plan adds the level of structure your team actually needs.
team.note: You can start with the right level for today and move up as volume, staffing, and workflow complexity grow.

features.one: A clean starting point for quotes, invoicing, and customer follow-up.
features.two: Keep requests and essential client history visible in one place.
features.three: Present services clearly with a catalog and public page.
features.four: Built for solo operators who want structure without extra overhead.

features.two: Add jobs and tasks to track execution more seriously.
features.three: More day-to-day control without team complexity.
features.four: The best fit for active solo operators.

features.two: Add planning and limited reservations to manage more flow.
features.three: Use AI, campaigns, and loyalty tools in the same system.
features.four: Built for solo businesses with more volume and growth needs.

features.one: A solid base for quotes, jobs, planning, and invoicing.
features.two: Built for small teams that need a shared workflow.
features.three: Keep the office and the field aligned in one system.
features.four: A practical starting point for team coordination.

features.two: Add stronger permissions and deeper operational control.
features.three: Built for growing teams that need more structure and visibility.
features.four: The best balance for scaling without enterprise overhead.

features.two: Advanced reporting and broader operational depth for mature teams.
features.three: Dedicated onboarding and stronger support as complexity increases.
features.four: Built for teams that need more depth across the business.

features.one: Custom rollout for larger or more complex organizations.
features.two: Support tailored limits, advanced controls, and guided implementation.
features.three: Built for multi-entity, security, or SLA-driven requirements.
features.four: Contact us for a more tailored setup.

starter.label: Team Core
starter.desc: For small teams building a more structured operating workflow.

pro.label: Team Growth
pro.desc: For growing teams that need more control and operational depth.

enterprise.label: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For organizations with advanced, multi-entity, or SLA-driven needs.

solo.title: Built for solo operators who want control without overhead

items.one: Keep quotes, invoices, and customer requests in one place from day one.
items.two: Present services clearly with a catalog and public page that still feels professional.
items.three: Move into jobs and task tracking when execution starts to get more demanding.
items.four: Unlock planning, reservations, AI, and growth tools only when your workflow needs them.
items.five: Move into team pricing later without rebuilding the way you work.

items.one: Quotes, jobs, tasks, and invoicing in one shared workflow.
items.two: One catalog for services and products across the business.
items.three: Better operational signals, including plan scan pricing context where relevant.
items.four: Client approvals and visibility through the portal.
items.five: Team roles and permissions that support cleaner execution.

solo.title: Start simple now, grow into more structure later
solo.body: Begin with a solo plan that fits the way you operate today, then move into team coordination only when hiring, volume, or workflow complexity make it necessary.

team.title: Need a more tailored rollout?
team.body: If your team needs custom limits, a security review, dedicated onboarding, or a more guided implementation path, we can help you map the right setup.

actions.plan_trial_note: Includes a 1 month trial during onboarding.

comparison.title: Compare what matters most before you choose
comparison.subtitle: Review the key capabilities, limits, and workflow depth included in each plan.
